testcase.name: testDisplayTotalRevenue_CompanyNotFound_Fails
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.792 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.792 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.792 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.792 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: IllegalArgumentException: No company

testcase.name: testDisplayTotalRevenue_AsManagerUnderOwner_Success
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.810 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.810 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.810 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.810 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: validating user 1 permissions in company 100 15:30:53.810 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.812 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: successfuly calculated total revenue for company 100.

testcase.name: testDisplayTotalRevenue_PermissionDenied_Fail
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.815 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.815 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.815 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.815 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: validating user 1 permissions in company 100 15:30:53.815 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: IllegalArgumentException: Not allowed

testcase.name: testViewSalesHistory_Success
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Retrieving sales history for specific company 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: validating user 1 have permissions in company 100 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving all events for company 100 15:30:53.817 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: collecting all orders for the company 100 events 15:30:53.818 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: succesfully collected all orders.

testcase.name: testViewSalesHistory_InvalidToken_Fail
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.819 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Retrieving sales history for specific company 15:30:53.819 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Auth error: Invalid Token

testcase.name: testViewSalesHistory_WrongCompany_SkipsOrder
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.820 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Retrieving sales history for specific company 15:30:53.820 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.820 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.820 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: validating user 1 have permissions in company 100 15:30:53.820 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving all events for company 100 15:30:53.821 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: collecting all orders for the company 100 events 15:30:53.821 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: succesfully collected all orders.

testcase.name: testDisplayTotalRevenue_MultipleEvents_SumsCorrectly
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: validating user 1 permissions in company 100 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.822 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: successfuly calculated total revenue for company 100.

testcase.name: testDisplayTotalRevenue_AsOwner_Success
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: validating user 1 permissions in company 100 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: calculating total revenue for company 100 15:30:53.823 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.displayTotalRevenue: successfuly calculated total revenue for company 100.

testcase.name: testViewSalesHistory_EventNotFound_SkipsOrder
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Retrieving sales history for specific company 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving company 100 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: validating user 1 have permissions in company 100 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: retrieving all events for company 100 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: collecting all orders for the company 100 events 15:30:53.824 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.ProductionCompanyService -- ProductionCompanyService.viewSalesHistory: succesfully collected all orders.
